item.title: Research Assistant [Masters]
H3K4 methylation at active genes mitigates transcription-replication conflicts during replication stress.
Inferring the transcriptional regulatory mechanism of signal-dependent gene expression via an integrative computational approach
Chinese Year End Party
item.description:
One-day Taipei Zoo tour and treasure-hunting game.

had a very nice meal at Juicy Bun restaurant near NCCU.

Wish everyone the best in the future year!

item.title: Setting boundaries for genome-wide heterochromatic DNA deletions through flanking inverted repeats in Tetrahymena thermophile

item.title: Borders of Cis-Regulatory DNA Sequences Preferentially Harbor the Divergent Transcription Factor Binding Motifs in the Human Genome

item.description: Nice weather and amazing labmates, we walked from Academia Sinica to Xiangshan!

item.title: Lab Cycle Challenge
item.description: We cycled 40km from Academia to Tamsui. Together we made it!

item.title: Comparative genomic analyses highlight the contribution of pseudogenized protein-coding genes to human lincRNAs

Jia Hsin Ryan and Bonnie Presented in ISEGB2016
item.description:
Jia-Hsin delivered oral presentation on his project, Ryan and Bonnie presented a poster on their projects in ISEGB 2016.

Jia-Hsin won The Best Student Oral Presentation Award! Congratulations!

item.description: Great lunch time with lab members!

David Wan Hsin and Ryan Presented in ISEGB2014
item.description:
David and Wan-Hsin delivered oral presentation on their projects, and Ryan presented a poster on his project in ISEGB 2014.

David won The Best Student Oral Presentation Award, and Ryan won second place for The Best Poster Award! Congratulations!

item.title: NangangShan
item.description: Year-End Party at NangangShan!

item.title: Zing PhD Thesis Defense
item.description: Congratulations to Dr. Tsai!

item.title: Pizza Party With Professor Shin Han Shiu
item.description: Pizza party to celebrate Zing’s award at BIT 2013 with Professor Shin-Han Shiu from Michigan State University! When we were full from all the pizza, we got to learn a new game!

item.title: Zing Won Most Popular Poster in ISEGB 2013
item.description:
Zing was awarded Most Popular Poster Award for his research on “Intrinsic Properties of Genomic Sequences allow Prediction of Transcription Factor Binding Sites” at ISEGB at National Chung Hsing University.

Congrats Zing!

item.title: Visit to Dr. Chun Hong Chen's Laboratory at NHRI
item.description: Visit to Dr. Chun-Hong Chen’s Mosqito Laboratory at NHRI in Chunan with bicycling and dinner at Nan-liao afterwards. What a fun day full of adventure and exercise!

item.title: Zing Won Best Presentation at BIT 2013
item.description: Zing was awarded Best Presentation for his research on “Associations between intronic non-B DNA structures and exon skipping” at BIT. Congratulations Zing!

item.title: Associations between intronic non-B DNA structures and exon skipping

item.title: CRG and as Exchange Workshop
item.description: Zing and Francis presented their work at the Exchange Workshop between Center for Genome Research (CRG), Spain and Academia Sinica (AS), Taiwan.

item.title: Zing Won Best Oral in ISEGB 2012
item.description:
Zing was awarded Best Oral Presentation for his research on “Evolution of Cis-Regulatory Features in Yeast De Novo Genes” in the Oral Competition of ISEGB.

Congrats Zing!

item.title: ISEGB at NSYSU
item.description:
The International Symposium on Evolutionary Genomics and Bioinformatics is held in National Sun Yet-Sen University on October 19th to 21st.

For more information please visit: http://biodiv.tw/symposium/2012ISEGB/index.php

item.title: ENCODE Presentation Series
item.description: Collaborating with labs in Academia Sinica and National Health Research Institute, there will be a series of presentations on ENCODE papers lasting for a few months.

item.title: Farewell and Welcome Party
item.description: We bid farewell to Ting-Wei and Krishna, at the same time a warm welcome to Dr. Hong-Da Chen and Wan-Hsin!

item.description: Congratulations Dr. Swamy!

item.title: MiniSymposium at NHRI
item.description:
The MiniSymposium on Bioinformatics, Systems Biology, and Molecular Evolution is held at National Health Research Institute

For more information please visit: http://bioinfo-dbb.nhri.org.tw/MBSM/index.php

item.title: The Impact of Normalization and Phylogenetic Information on Estimating the Distance for Metagenomes
Analysis of the association between transcription factor binding site variants and distinct accompanying regulatory motifs in yeast.
De novo motif discovery facilitates identification of interactions between transcription factors in Saccharomyces cerevisiae
Evolution of cis-regulatory elements in yeast de novo and duplicated new genes
MetaRank: a rank conversion scheme for comparative analysis of microbial community compositions
MetaABC
item.description: MetaABC is a pipeline that integrates advanced binning tools coupled with data filters and normalizations for improving metagenomic analysis. It incorporates two means for removing artifacts, five methods for taxonomic binning, an approach to re-analyze unassigned reads, and an option to control sampling biases via genome-length normalization. It can handle sequencing data generated using different technologies. In a single platform, MetaABC furnishes various analyzing routes that allow users to reach an optimized outcome.

item.title: MetaABC—an integrated metagenomics platform for data adjustment, binning and clustering

Genome-wide analysis of the cis-regulatory modules of divergent gene pairs in yeast.
Reanalyze unassigned reads in Sanger based metagenomic data using conserved gene adjacency.
Impact of DNA-binding position variants on yeast gene expression
Co-expression of neighboring genes in the zebrafish (Danio rerio) genome.
Roles of Trans and Cis Variation in Yeast Intraspecies Evolution of Gene Expression
Evolutionary conservation of DNA-contact residues in DNA-binding domains.
Discovering gapped binding sites of yeast transcription factors.
Co-expression of adjacent genes in yeast cannot be simply attributed to shared regulatory system.
MYBS: a comprehensive web server for mining transcription factor binding sites in yeast.
Method for identifying transcription factor binding sites in yeast.
Statistical methods for identifying yeast cell cycle transcription factors.
Cysteine separations profiles on protein sequences infer disulfide connectivity.
An evolutionary algorithm for large traveling salesman problems
An evolutionary approach for gene expression patterns.
Designing multiple-use primer set for multiplex PCR by using compact GAs
Some issues of designing genetic algorithms for traveling salesman problems
Heterogeneous selection genetic algorithms for traveling salesman problems
GEM: a Gaussian Evolutionary Method for predicting protein side-chain conformations.
